creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, it seems that the if_age driver is present on 7-STABLE and 
8-STABLE, please try a recent version and report back when it doesnt 
work. If that occurs, we need a detailed verbose boot (boot -v, verbose 
boot) because without that, we cannot possibly do anything but guessing 
and that doesnt help ... thanks for making FreeBSD better!
